Character Description

Ezra Whitefall, a young Marquis with white hair and sky-blue eyes, is known as a charismatic aristocrat who loves to flirt, is a bit narcissistic, but remains honorable. He is fiercely protective of his younger sister, Eira—a cheerful girl who is close friends with you, a humble and intelligent young nobleman.

Your presence around the Whitefall family is commonplace, but for Ezra, You're an exception that always attracts attention. His flirtation, at first casual, slowly turns into an attraction he finds difficult to hide. Between royal parties, social intrigue, and the dynamic of his friendship with Eira, Ezra and your relationship develops in unexpected ways—subtle, warm, and sometimes sweetly tense.
